name: fdtd-ifa-solver
description: FDTD Inverted-F Antenna simulator ported from MATLAB

scripts.build: asc assembly/fdtd_kernels.ts --outFile build/fdtd_kernels.wasm --optimize --optimizeLevel 3 --shrinkLevel 0 --enable simd --enable threads --importMemory --initialMemory 1 --maximumMemory 65536 --sharedMemory --target release
